description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker.nix-community.org/nixpkgs/nix-flakes Docker image. Define a hidden job template .hydra-cli that runs the two shell commands: `nix run --inputs-from ./. nixpkgs#hydra-cli -- -H https://hydra.nix-community.org` and `jobset-wait simple-nixos-mailserver \"${jobset}\"`. Add a hydra-master job extending .hydra-cli, limited to the master branch, with variable jobset set to \"master\". Add a hydra-pr job extending .hydra-cli, limited to merge requests, with variable jobset set to $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID. Both jobs inherit the script and run in the default stage.
